# Aesthetica Dental Clinic — Punawale, Pune

> Multispeciality dental clinic led by Dr. Prachi Gupta Garg (BDS, Certified Cosmetologist).
> Located in Punawale, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Pune – 411033.
> Phone: +91 92266 80164

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://aestheticadental.github.io/): Overview of all services, doctor profile, contact
- [Root Canal Treatment](https://aestheticadental.github.io/root-canal-punawale.html): Painless RCT in Punawale
- [Dental Implants](https://aestheticadental.github.io/dental-implants-punawale.html): Permanent tooth replacement
- [Clear Aligners](https://aestheticadental.github.io/aligners-punawale.html): Invisible orthodontic treatment
- [Root Canal Cost Guide](https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/cost-of-root-canal-in-punawale.html): 2026 pricing guide
- [Signs You Need Root Canal](https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/signs-you-need-root-canal.html): Symptoms guide

## Services offered

Root canal treatment, dental implants, clear aligners, porcelain veneers, teeth whitening,
teeth cleaning, orthodontics, paediatric dentistry, restorative care.

## Catchment area

Punawale, Wakad, Tathawade, Ravet, Hinjewadi, Pimpri-Chinchwad.
